steps.title: Pick two points on the line of best fit
steps.content:
Reading the line at the ends of the visible range:
  • At $x = 0$ hours, $y \approx 175°\text{F}$.
  • At $x = 10$ hours, $y \approx 575°\text{F}$.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: The line slopes upward, so temperature is increasing — eliminate B and D. A says about $170°\text{F}$/hr, which is far too large. The slope of about $40°\text{F}$/hr matches choice C. That matches choice C — C is correct.
